header_description: Manage your integrations, API keys, recommendation algorithm, and local data.
gemini_description: Used to translate game descriptions to the user's language.
get_api_key_button: Get it in Google AI Studio
rawg_description: Used as a source of metadata, trending games, and upcoming releases.
search_metadata_description: Downloads covers and synopses in the background.
fetch_covers_tooltip: Searches only for covers for games that are missing an image
fill_missing_tooltip: Fills genres, description, tags, and other empty fields by querying RAWG live
recommendation_focus_description: Adjust the balance between your personal taste (tags/genres) and what is popular in the community.
nostalgia_factor_description: Defines how much older games are penalized in recommendations.
series_settings_description: Customize how the algorithm handles game sequences and franchises.
filter_adult_description: Hide games with adult content from recommendations.
save_credentials_description: Stores your keys locally in encrypted form.
manage_backup_description: Export or restore your full library (JSON). Automatic backups are created during important updates.
backup_location_info: Automatic backups are saved in app_data/backups/
clear_cache_description: Remove expired data or the entire cache to free up space.
image_storage_description: Save covers on your computer to view offline. Uses disk space.
